title: Vital Farms
blurb: Short thesis on Vital Farms soon after the IPO. In hindsight, shorting this IPO class was like shooting fish in a barrel, but I am proud of the supporting work. The idea won SumZero's Top Stocks for 2021 contest in the Small Cap category.

title: Doric Nimrod Air
blurb: An amazing situation where investing boiled down the valuing a single Airbus A380 owned by this AIM-listed holdco.

title: Phreesia
blurb: A tactical short based on digesting management's KPI management. It worked, though it landed just under $19.

title: Minds + Machines
blurb: A registrar of domains, ranging from .wedding to .beer and .xxx, listed on London's AIM (essentially Verisign, but worse in all ways other than the price). I liked this a lot and it was bought out by GoDaddy for a nice premium later in 2021. If I recall correctly, it was hairier than I let on.

title: Spirit AeroSystems
blurb: My favorite A&D stock while I covered the industry at SIG. I was sad to have seen it taken out by Boeing. Curiously, as soon as that happened, it seemed like the supply chain was whipped into shape, which suggests I might have missed something...
